description_long: This object consists of a cluster of green foliage interspersed with small, vibrant pink flowers, set against a backdrop of rough, gray stone or concrete. The flowers appear to be growing at the base of a vertical stone structure, possibly a wall or monument, with the foliage spreading outward and partially obscuring the stone. The leaves are dense and varied in shape, with some appearing lanceolate and others more ovate, creating a lush, natural look. The pink flowers are scattered throughout the greenery, adding pops of color and visual interest. The stone surface is textured and segmented, suggesting it is constructed from large blocks or slabs. The overall composition suggests a patch of urban vegetation, possibly found in a park, garden, or along a city sidewalk.
description: A dense cluster of green foliage with scattered pink flowers growing at the base of a rough, gray stone structure. The flowers and leaves create a vibrant, natural contrast against the textured stone backdrop.
description_view_0: This view highlights the dense greenery and pink flowers spreading outward from the base of the stone structure, with the stone surface partially visible.
description_view_1: The stone structure is more prominent from this angle, with the foliage and flowers appearing to emerge from its base and side.
description_view_2: The segmented, textured stone surface dominates this view, with the greenery and flowers visible along the lower edge.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the vertical spread of the foliage and flowers, with the stone structure mostly obscured by the dense plant growth.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, with some overlapping and forming small clusters, typical of many ornamental garden flowers.
